baslik: Power outages hit France as record heatwave set to peak
ozet: About 68,000 homes in Brittany have been affected, with electricity unlikely to be fully restored until Wednesday night.

baslik: Congress passes war powers measure for first time, breaking with Trump over Iran
ozet: The resolution passed on Tuesday was largely symbolic, but it adds to pressure on the White House to end the conflict once and for all.

baslik: UN says it will evacuate sailors stranded in Strait of Hormuz, as Rubio warns against tolls
ozet: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio warned Iran that no country can charge fees for ships to travel through the strait.

baslik: Clean sweep for Mamdani-backed candidates in New York's Democratic primary
ozet: Brad Lander unseats Dan Goldman in a race that laid bare the city's divisions over the Israel-Gaza war.

baslik: Ukraine strikes knock out power in key city in Russian-occupied Crimea
ozet: Sevastopol's Moscow-installed governor warns there will be no electricity in some areas until the evening.

baslik: GTA 6 will cost $80 - and physical edition will not contain a disc
ozet: Rockstar has said physical copies of the game will contain a code for a digital download for the game.

baslik: Google's YouTube settles social media addiction case with teen
ozet: The 15-year-old plaintiff's case against three other tech giants begins next month.

baslik: Meta halts worker tracking for AI training due to privacy fears
ozet: The company had started just two months ago tracking workers’ computer usage for AI training data.

baslik: Millions in UK could claim share of £3bn after Apple case given green light
ozet: Apple rejected the suggestion its practices are anti-competitive, saying many customers rely on third-party alternatives.

baslik: Steam Machine launches with £879 price tag as Valve cites component costs
ozet: Valve said the cost of its PC-console hybrid reflects a broader trend of component costs rising over time.
